summary: Insurance lead generation / agent pitch platform for Houston/Conroe agents. Includes AI video, testimonials, carrier icons, portal button, and location section. Being optimized as a demo to sell to local insurance agents.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Mockup screenshot of a Figma-style UI wireframe design for an insurance landing page, clean and minimal design board aesthetic (figma-design-screenshot.dim_600x400.png)
- Mockup screenshot of a live browser preview showing an insurance agent website on a laptop screen (live-preview-screenshot.dim_600x400.png)
- Mockup screenshot of a Google search results page showing '#1' ranking for a Conroe insurance query (conroe-number-one-screenshot.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Update all testimonial references that mention 'Karen' to display 'TX Agent J.D. - 12 quotes first month' instead. Remove the name 'Karen' from all testimonial content across every testimonial component (TestimonialsSection, HoustonTestimonialsSection, ReevesAboutSection, and any other component displaying testimonials).

Change the hero section headline to 'Conroe Agents: Get 12+ Quotes/Month' and ensure it is the most prominent above-the-fold text in all hero components (HeroSection, HoustonHeroSection, ReevesHeroSection). The headline must be visible without scrolling on standard desktop and mobile viewports.

Add a 'Process Proof' section in the footer area (above or integrated into the footer) that displays 3 steps as visual screenshot placeholders with labels: 'Figma Design', 'Live Preview', and 'Conroe #1'. Use arrow connectors between steps to show the progression. The section heading should communicate a proven build process.

Replace every phone number displayed in the UI with (832) 555-1234. This includes the Header phone CTA, FloatingCallButton tel: href, ContactSection/ReevesContactSection business info, Footer/ReevesFooter/HoustonFooter contact details, StickyQuoteBar if it shows a phone, and any other component rendering a phone number. Also update the default fallback phone value in the useBusinessInfo hook.

Update all primary CTA quote buttons (Get Free Quote, Get Quote, Submit Quote, etc.) to display the urgency text 'Get Conroe Site - 3 Spots Left Week'. Apply this to the main CTA button in the hero section, the header 'Get Free Quote' button, and any other prominent quote/CTA buttons in HoustonHeroSection, ReevesHeroSection, HoustonQuoteForm submit button, and EmotionalCloseSection CTAs.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update testimonial to 'TX Agent J.D. - 12 quotes first month' and remove Karen name
Change hero headline to 'Conroe Agents: Get 12+ Quotes/Month' above fold
Add process proof section in footer with 3 screenshots: 'Figma Design → Live Preview → Conroe #1'
Replace all phone numbers with US number (832) 555-1234 (Google Voice)
Update CTA quote button text to 'Get Conroe Site - 3 Spots Left Week' for urgency
